title: OpenStax U.S. History
description: A source card for the OpenStax U.S. History textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax U.S. History is a survey textbook covering early America, colonization, revolution, expansion, slavery, civil war, industrialization, reform, war, civil rights, and modern political and social change.
Use this source as a chapter picker for older students who need more background than a primary-source excerpt can provide. The book is licensed CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.

usagePolicy.reason: This book may not be used in the training of large language models or otherwise be ingested into large language models or generative AI offerings without OpenStax's permission.

licenseAudit.note: OpenStax attribution, noncommercial, and share-alike requirements apply to adaptations. Generative-AI ingestion requires OpenStax permission.
